chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-760 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 26.01.2026. Mr. Faisal Qayoom Detho, Advocate for Petitioner alongwith Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh alongwith SIP Tarique Hussain Mari (Additional SHO PS Daur). ***************************************** RIAZAT ALI SAHAR, J.- Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the private respondents being influential are trying to illegally occupy and usurp the agricultural land of Petitioner’s brother situated in Revenue Survey No.91/3, Deh 10 Nusrat, Taluka Daur District Shaheeed Benazirabad and prays for protection. The Petitioner is also present in Court and points out that Tarique Hussain Mari Additional SHO PS Daur is the close relative of one Respondent, therefore, the hindrance are being created, however, he admits that the Civil litigation is pending pertaining to the same land. On the other hand, SIP Tarique Hussain Mari (Additional SHO PS Daur) present in Court submits parawise comments on behalf of SHO PS Daur and undertakes that neither he has harassed anyone nor he intends to do so in future and further submits that the legal protection would be provided to both the parties on their approach in accordance with law. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SSP and SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioner, as and when approached. Furthermore, since the Petitioner has alleged that legal proceedings are being influenced due to the inference of Additional SHO PS Daur namely SIP Tarique Hussain Mari, who is close relative of Respondent, therefore, Deputy Inspector General of Police Shaheed Benazirabad Range is directed to transfer the above named SIP from PS Daur to some other place under the intimation

In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SSP and SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioner, as and when approached. Furthermore, since the Petitioner has alleged that legal proceedings are being influenced due to the inference of Additional SHO PS Daur namely SIP Tarique Hussain Mari, who is close relative of Respondent, therefore, Deputy Inspector General of Police Shaheed Benazirabad Range is directed to transfer the above named SIP from PS Daur to some other place under the intimation Page 2 of 2 of this Court. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect the proceedings already pending against the Petitioner or Respondent(s) before the competent Court(s) of law. Let the copy of this order be transmitted to DIG Police, Shaheed Benazirabad (Nawabshah) for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
